content_of_post_to_comment: I do not want a ring, I want to be free. I want to pay my bills. I want to live alone. I want to spend time in nature. I want to have meaningful friendships. I want to be free. I want to be free. I want to be free.
comment: The tension seems less ring vs freedom and more dependence vs self-sustaining structure—paying bills alone often buys solitude but can shrink the social safety net that makes nature-time actually possible.
